task_completion.description: Load the wild-type T4 lysozyme structure (PDB: 2LZM)
task_completion.visual_evidence: The PyMOL viewer window should display a 3D protein structure. The object menu or command history should indicate that '2LZM' has been loaded.

task_completion.description: Highlight Isoleucine 3 and Cysteine 97 in stick representation
task_completion.visual_evidence: Two specific residues (ILE 3 and CYS 97) should be clearly visible and rendered as sticks (thicker bonds showing individual atoms) on the protein structure.

task_completion.description: Measure the specific distance between the C-beta (CB) atoms of ILE 3 and CYS 97
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dashed measurement line must connect the C-beta atoms of the two highlighted residues. A distance label of approximately 4.6 (or 4.63) Å should be visible next to the dashed line.
A PyMOL command (e.g., 'png ~/PyMOL_Data/images/t4l_engineered_disulfide.png'), a save dialog, or a file manager window showing the newly created image file at the specified path.

task_completion.description: Write a geometric analysis report to ~/PyMOL_Data/t4l_disulfide_report.txt
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing the contents of 't4l_disulfide_report.txt'. The text must explicitly mention ILE 3 and CYS 97, state the measured distance (~4.63 Å), and conclude whether it is geometrically favorable.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used PyMOL to perform the visualization and measurement
integrity.visual_evidence: The PyMOL GUI or PyMOL command-line interface should be visible in the screenshots, showing actual interaction with the 3D viewer rather than just viewing a pre-downloaded image.

integrity.description: Verify the measurement was actually calculated by the software
integrity.visual_evidence: The measurement label in the PyMOL viewer should be a native PyMOL distance object (typically yellow text with a dashed line), not text overlaid by an external image editor.

integrity.description: Verify the report contains the actual measured value rather than a generic placeholder
integrity.visual_evidence: The distance value written in the text report should match the value shown on the measurement line in the PyMOL viewer (around 4.63 Å).

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct PDB ID is 2LZM. The target residues are Isoleucine 3 (ILE 3) and Cysteine 97 (CYS 97). The actual Euclidean distance between their C-beta (CB) atoms is approximately 4.63 Å, which falls within the acceptable range of 4.2 to 4.8 Å. The figure must be saved to /home/ga/PyMOL_Data/images/t4l_engineered_disulfide.png and the report to /home/ga/PyMOL_Data/t4l_disulfide_report.txt.
